title: AFK Journey
notes:
Major Updates
The Crown of Ashes season will officially launch after the update for servers that have been active for at least 21 days. To unlock the season, you must reach Level 240 with your Hands of Resonance and complete New Journey. Once these conditions are met, simply complete the tutorial quests to begin the new season's storyline: King's Sword.

title: Raid of The Brave
notes:
New Class: Warlock
Master the Abyss. Lead the Horde.

title: Ragnarok Origin Classic
notes: New expansion [Sakura Vows] is live

title: Eternal Sword Pact
notes:
1.Visual & Engine Optimizations: Further optimized character textures and environment rendering for a smoother visual experience. 
2.UI Polish: Refined the visual presentation of selected in-game menus and item icons. 
3.Performance Enhancements: Addressed minor graphical glitches and improved overall client stability.

title: Project Entropy
notes: - Other gaming experience and display optimizations.

title: Screwdom
notes:
New Event: Puzzle Pieces. Complete levels and collect puzzle pieces to earn special rewards.
New Seasonal: Summer Pass. Enjoy a sunny adventure packed with exclusive rewards.
Bug fixes and performance improvements.

title: The Battle Cats
notes:
